title: Power of Sale (Auction 06 of 2025)
text:
THE DEPARTMENT OF INLAND REVENUE
THE MINISTRY OF FINANCE
APPLICATION TO BID ON POWER OF SALE PROPERTY LISTED
AUCTION 06 - 2025
Assessment No: Assessed Value :
Bidder's Name :
